error.unexpected: Unexpected error communicating with Audi Connect server

data_description.api_level: For Audi vehicles, the API request data structure varies by model. Newer vehicles use an updated data structure compared to older models. Adjusting the API Level ensures that the system automatically applies the correct data structure for each specific vehicle. This can be changed later via the Reconfigure option.

data_description.spin: Optional S-PIN for vehicle actions such as lock/unlock.
data_description.region: The region associated with your Audi Connect account.
data_description.api_level: For Audi vehicles, the API request data structure varies by model. Newer vehicles use an updated data structure compared to older models. Adjusting the API Level ensures that the system automatically applies the correct data structure for each specific vehicle.

data_description.scan_initial: Perform a cloud update immediately upon startup.
data_description.filter_vins: Comma-separated VIN list to exclude from setup and updates.

refresh_vehicle_data.name: Refresh Vehicle Data
refresh_vehicle_data.description: Requests an update of the vehicle state directly, as opposed to the normal update mechanism which only retrieves data from the cloud.

execute_vehicle_action.name: Execute Vehicle Action
execute_vehicle_action.description: Performs various actions on the vehicle.

device_id.name: Vehicle
device_id.description: The Audi vehicle to perform the action on.

action.name: Action
action.description: The specific action to perform on the vehicle. Note that available actions may vary based on the vehicle.

start_climate_control.name: Start Climate Control
start_climate_control.description: Start the climate control with options for temperature, glass surface heating, and auto seat comfort.

device_id.name: Vehicle
device_id.description: The Audi vehicle to start climate control on.

temp_f.name: Target Temperature (Fahrenheit)
temp_f.description: (Optional) Set temperature in °F. Defaults to 70°F if not provided. Overrides 'temp_c'.

temp_c.name: Target Temperature (Celsius)
temp_c.description: (Optional) Set temperature in °C. Defaults to 21°C if not provided. Overridden if 'temp_f' is provided.

glass_heating.name: Glass Surface Heating
glass_heating.description: (Optional) Enable or disable glass surface heating.

seat_fl.name: Auto Seat Comfort: Front-Left
seat_fl.description: (Optional) Enable or disable Auto Seat Comfort for the front-left seat.

seat_fr.name: Auto Seat Comfort: Front-Right
seat_fr.description: (Optional) Enable or disable Auto Seat Comfort for the front-right seat.

seat_rl.name: Auto Seat Comfort: Rear-Left
seat_rl.description: (Optional) Enable or disable Auto Seat Comfort for the rear-left seat.

seat_rr.name: Auto Seat Comfort: Rear-Right
seat_rr.description: (Optional) Enable or disable Auto Seat Comfort for the rear-right seat.

climatisation_at_unlock.name: Climatisation at Unlock
climatisation_at_unlock.description: (Optional) Enable climate control to continue when vehicle is unlocked.

climatisation_mode.name: Climatisation Mode
climatisation_mode.description: (Optional) Maximum comfort (Comfort) or energy-saving (Economy). Default is Comfort.

refresh_cloud_data.name: Refresh Cloud Data
refresh_cloud_data.description: Retrieves current cloud data without triggering a vehicle refresh. Data may be outdated if the vehicle has not checked in recently.

start_auxiliary_heating.name: Start Auxiliary Heating
start_auxiliary_heating.description: Start auxiliary heating the vehicle, with option for duration.

device_id.name: Vehicle
device_id.description: The Audi vehicle to start auxiliary heating on.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: The number of minutes the auxiliary heater should run before turning off. Default is 20 minutes if not provided.

set_target_soc.name: Set Target State of Charge
set_target_soc.description: Set the target state of charge (battery %) for the vehicle.

device_id.name: Vehicle
device_id.description: The Audi vehicle to set the target charge level for.
